title: Persisted watcher observations and execute-false attention queue
user_task: As Eva, inspect persisted watcher observations and local attention queue items, then decide the next safe bounded tool call without executing live Codex control or GUI mutation.
expected_public_safe_evidence: source coverage for watcher specs observations and attention queue
watcher freshness confidence ttl and reason codes
execute=false local attention queue tool calls
actionsPerformed false for live control gui mutation external write and release actions
proof_boundary: Dry-run fixture and MCP scenario for persisted watcher observations and execute-false local attention queue items over LCO-owned derived cache. It proves public-safe watcher event recall and non-executed queue packets only; it does not prove hook capture, model compaction, true Codex compaction-summary capture, live control, GUI mutation, unattended autonomy, release readiness, or 1.2 GA readiness.
next_action: Implement hook sidecar closeout, state-prep, and compaction-marker capture in #412 after #411 lands.
